assistant.title: Research assistant
assistant.notConfiguredEnv: No API key configured — add GEMINI_API_KEY (recommended) to .env
assistant.staticHostingNote: Vercel static deploy has no AI backend. Use Node or Docker with server .env for /api/ai.
assistant.emptyState: Ask about the loaded structure, selected residue, polymer contacts, or general biology. Every answer uses the full platform context automatically.

toasts.notConfiguredHint: Add provider keys to server .env and restart.
